training_status: 3-5 times per week resistance training and cardio, distance running

benefits.description: Lost over 40lbs in 4 months, muscle definition coming in, helps maintain healthy deficit
Building muscle while in deficit, targeting visceral fat
Struggling to eat 1500 calories a day, appetite significantly suppressed
Running endurance increased significantly, improved from 15 minute mile to 10 minute mile in 4 months

protocol_notes: Started June 2025 at 4mg Retatrutide, 1mg Tesamorelin, 500mcg Semaglutide. Current doses as of September: 8.5mg Retatrutide, 2mg Tesamorelin, 1mg Semaglutide. Plans to cycle off Tesamorelin after 2 more months. Prescribed by doctor at compounding pharmacy due to initial obesity (326lbs). User reports starting at 4mg was recommended due to severe obesity. Caloric intake 1500-2000 calories per day depending on adherence. High protein diet with animal sources, whey isolate, Greek yogurt. Protein2o during workouts.
